hey, i’m anne lee steele.

i’m currently: @ the alan turing institute supporting the turing way @ school of commons gathering poetic tactics to counter extraction train attention @ fosdem co-organising the open research devroom @ school for poetic computation thinking about solidarity and infrastructure(s) +++ a few other things…


made with peace in mind, by @aleesteele
